onsetsample.Description: the onset time of the event

duration.Description: duration of the event (not in use)

stimnumber.Description: ID number of the stimulus that was shown

stim.Description: path to the stimulus that was shown

rotation.Description: rotation of the stimulus in degrees

speedcondition.Description: stimulus presentation speed (0 = 5 Hz and 1 = 20 Hz)

stimduration.Description: time the stimulus was on the screen (s)

stimname.Description: name of the stimulus that was shown

response.Description: did the participant press the response button? 0 = no and 1 = yes

rt.Description: response time of the button press

correct.Description: accuracy of the button press. 1 = correct

time_stimoff.Description: time the stimulus is taken away
